events.title: Can commercial farming and conservation co-exist?
events.description: A predator-proof fence at a Victorian farm is helping endangered species recover while proving conservation and agriculture can successfully co-exist.

events.title: Ollie Hollands 'in a good space' despite late omission after brother's struggles
events.description: Carlton coach Michael Voss says Elijah Hollands's younger brother Ollie is doing OK despite being a late out for the club's Anzac Day clash with Fremantle.

events.title: 'Tombstone tourists' keep Australia's oldest surviving European cemetery alive
events.description: Nestled between apartment blocks and opposite an escape room, St John's Cemetery holds many unique stories from history.

events.title: Two out of three stolen cars are left with 'some form of hazard' in them
events.description: 'Opportunistic' car thieves are leaving vehicles littered with syringes, weapons and even traps, and in 2025, 77 per cent of vehicles inspected by one contractor had signs of me...

events.title: Threatened fish rescued in Victoria's 'most flow-stressed river'
events.description: A small fish that smells like freshly-cut cucumber could be akin to a canary in the coalmine for one of Victoria's most stressed rivers.
